categories.name: Components
categories.description: Bespoke motion primitives with shadcn-compatible registry endpoints.

categories.name: Blocks
categories.description: Composed, product-ready widgets built from beUI motion primitives.

components.name: Tilt Card
components.description: 3D perspective tilt on hover with cursor-tracked glare.

components.name: Button
components.description: Spring-pressed Button plus StatefulButton (idle → loading → success / error) and MagneticButton.

components.name: Marquee
components.description: Infinite horizontal or vertical scroll with pause-on-hover.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Pill, segment or underline tabs with a spring layoutId indicator.

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggle with a spring-driven thumb and press feedback.

components.name: Select
components.description: Composable select primitives whose panel bouncily unfolds out of the trigger and separates, plus a Morph variant where the trigger grows into the panel via shared layout.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Form choice control with a draw-on checkmark, spring press feedback and indeterminate state support.

components.name: Radio Group
components.description: Single-select choice control with a gliding layoutId indicator dot and spring press feedback.

components.name: Bottom Sheet
components.description: Vaul-inspired draggable bottom sheet with snap points, inertia and glass surface.

components.name: Shared Layout Background
components.description: A pill that glides between hovered items via motion's shared layout, with blur enter/exit.

components.name: Dock
components.description: macOS-style dock with grouped actions and a gliding active pill.

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Hover or focus tooltip with blur enter/exit and spring spawn.

components.name: Morphing Modal
components.description: Family-app-style modal. A single panel that morphs its height as you navigate between inner views, with blur cross-fade on content.

components.name: Text Animation
components.description: Animated text primitives for reveal sequences, shimmer loading states and letter-cascade swaps.

components.name: Number Animation
components.description: Animated number primitives for count-up values and rolling digit tickers.

components.name: Animated Badge
components.description: Status badge with animated state icons, pulse feedback and compact size variants.

components.name: Action Swap
components.description: CTA button and slot primitives for swapping text and icons with blur motion.

components.name: Animated Toast Stack
components.description: Stacked toasts with status morphs, swipe dismissal, actions and layout-aware motion.

components.name: Theme Toggle
components.description: Theme toggle button with a full-page rectangle clip-path reveal via the View Transition API.

components.name: Bouncy Accordion
components.description: Single-open accordion with weighted spring layout, icon rows and reduced-motion-safe content reveals.

components.name: Drawer
components.description: Side panel that slides in from the left or right with a spring, backdrop blur, body scroll lock and esc-to-close.

components.name: Scroll Animation
components.description: Scroll-driven motion: a Lenis smooth-scroll provider and a reading-progress indicator that reads from it.

components.name: Range Slider
components.description: Range slider with tick dots and a bouncy vertical-bar thumb that glides between snapped steps; drag and keyboard control, reduced-motion safe.

components.name: Multi-chain Swap
components.description: Cross-chain swap widget with chain + token selectors, morphing views, animated flip and quote.

components.name: Dynamic Island
components.description: iOS-style island pill that morphs between live activity views with bouncy shell resize and blur crossfades.

components.name: Command Palette
components.description: ⌘K palette with fuzzy filter, spring-animated active row and glass surface.

components.name: Expandable Action Bar
components.description: Compact icon actions that expand into labeled controls on hover or focus with shared layout motion.

components.name: Overflow Actions
components.description: Connected pill rail for primary actions that springs open to reveal extra controls.

components.name: Expandable Tabs
components.description: Icon tab bar where the active tab expands to a labelled pill, with a panel above that morphs height and slides content direction-aware on switch.

components.name: Swipeable List
components.description: Mobile-style list rows that swipe left or right to reveal contextual action buttons.

components.name: File Upload
components.description: Drag-and-drop upload queue with progress rows, retry/remove actions and reduced-motion-safe state changes.

components.name: Prediction Market
components.description: Prediction market trade ticket with buy/sell modes, outcome prices, rolling amount entry, quick add chips and trade states.

components.name: OTP Input
components.description: One-time-code input with a gliding focus ring, digits that roll in per slot, error shake and a success check draw.

components.name: Bloom Menu
components.description: A button that morphs open into a menu and blooms iris-out from the center, the grid revealing in every direction with radially staggered items.

components.name: 404 / Not Found
components.description: Animated 404 pages in five styles: glitch scramble, magnetic digits, cursor spotlight, a fanning card stack and a typed terminal.
